title: ferray-strings: alternative compact storage backend (fixed-width or Arrow-style)
description: Follow-up from #522. Prototype an alternative storage layout for StringArray: either fixed-width [u8; N] elements (matching numpy U10/S20 chararrays) or Apache Arrow's offsets-plus-values pattern. Goal: 3-5x memory reduction and better cache locality vs the current Vec<String> per-element layout. Make the backend selectable via a feature flag; preserve the public iter()-based API.
